channel.title: developmental cognitive neuroscience on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in developmental cognitive neuroscience on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Study protocol: Transitions in Adolescent Girls (TAG)
item.description:
Citation:
Barendse, M.E.A., Vijayakumar, N., Byrne, M.L., Flannery, J.E., Cheng, T.W., Flournoy, J.C., Nelson, B.W., Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Chavez, S.J., Hval, L., Brady, B., Nadel, H., Helzer, A., Shirtclif, E.A., Allen, N.B., & Pfeifer, J.H. (In Press) Study protocol: Transitions in AdolescentGirls (TAG). Frontiers Psychiatry

item.title: Improving practices and inferences in developmental cognitive neuroscience
item.description:
Citation:
Pfeifer, J. H., Flournoy, J . F., Cheng, T. W., Cosme, D., Flannery, J. E., & Vijayakumar, N. Improving practices and inferences in developmental cognitive neuroscience.
